items.title: Scaffold Next.js TypeScript platform
items.description: Create application foundation with app router, Tailwind, linting, and testing baseline.
items.proposed_solution: Initialize Next.js app with typed module boundaries and route groups for auth/dashboard/portal.
blockers: terminal-based dependency installation unavailable in this session

items.title: Implement auth + tenant + role routing
items.description: Build login, session, agency selector, and role selector with protected routes.
items.proposed_solution: Use middleware plus server actions with tenant/role scoped session context.
blockers: production identity provider and signed session strategy pending

items.title: Build healthcare admin operational core
items.description: Patient admission, assignments, schedule creation, and admin dashboard basics.
items.proposed_solution: Wizard-based admission flow with assignment tables and schedule recurrence editor.
blockers: data layer is currently in-memory only
authorization and schedule modules still scaffolded
follow_up_steps: replace in-memory patient store with persistent data layer
implement schedule template to schedule engine handoff
add admission list filters and search

items.title: Implement caregiver daily and weekly flow
items.description: Mobile-first visit execution with draft save, copy actions, signatures, and weekly submit.
items.proposed_solution: Offline-tolerant draft model with pre-submit validation and warning deep links.
blockers: workflow engines and APIs are not implemented behind newly scaffolded routes
follow_up_steps: implement daily draft persistence and weekly submit state transitions
enforce copy policy guards that exclude signatures and GPS data
implement caregiver and patient signature capture with verification
implement clock/GPS integration and warning generation

items.title: Add exception engine and revision history
items.description: System warning generation, review workflows, and immutable admin revisions.
items.proposed_solution: Rule engine for warning generation plus revision diff store with timeline UI.

items.title: Implement billing/payroll/reporting/export stack
items.description: Generate billing and payroll line items from approved records and expose report/export center.
items.proposed_solution: Pipeline from approved weekly forms to line items to export jobs with status tracking.
blockers: payer billing rule catalog not defined

items.title: Implement patient portal and notifications
items.description: Patient-facing signature workflow and role-appropriate notifications.
items.proposed_solution: Portal task list centered on pending signature actions with direct weekly form context.
